response.global_analysis: The audio for the musical performance segment (00:00 to 02:57) matches the reference JSON lyrics for the song 'GREATEST'. The video contains the full performance, followed by a talk segment and merchandise promotion. Subtitles are tightly synchronized to the vocal audio and on-screen lyrics. English translations are provided for the song lyrics and spoken dialogue, maintaining contextual continuity.

subtitles.english: Everything is alright

subtitles.original: 奇跡よりも大胆に勝つの
subtitles.english: I'll win even more boldly than a miracle

subtitles.original: 見たことない景色だって
subtitles.english: Even scenery I've never seen before
Is filling with light
Wanna be the GREATEST
If it's a map, it's in this heart
There's a surging heat

subtitles.original: 誰も止めらんない my way
subtitles.english: No one can stop my way
Wanna be the GREATEST

subtitles.original: 弱音も重ねればシンフォニー
subtitles.english: Even complaints, if layered, become a symphony
Singing that I can become strong
"I'll surely become invincible"
(Feel my light)

subtitles.original: 部屋で一人描いたステージも
subtitles.english: Even the stage I drew alone in my room

subtitles.original: 覚えていて 居場所になる
subtitles.english: I'll remember it, it will be my place
I can hear voices

subtitles.original: 深呼吸をして 飛び乗るくらいが正攻法だって
subtitles.english: Take a deep breath, jumping in is the standard way

subtitles.original: 胸を張って踊るのも悪くないわ
subtitles.english: It's not bad to dance with your head held high
Don't be afraid, it's alright

subtitles.original: 唱えるたび絶対になるの
subtitles.english: Every time I chant, it becomes absolute

subtitles.original: 一度きりの人生だって
subtitles.english: Even in this one-time life
Take the helm with these hands
Wanna be the GREATEST
As myself
I'll go down the shining path

subtitles.original: 声も煌めいて my day
subtitles.english: Even my voice sparkles on my day
Wanna be the GREATEST

subtitles.original: 目覚めを奏でてオーバーチュア
subtitles.english: Play the awakening overture
Granted as much as I wish
I'll become even more wonderful
(Feel my heart)
[Feel my heart]
[See me become the GREATEST]
[No one can beat me]
[Cuz I'm a GREATEST]
Wanna be the GREATEST
The number of things I loved and gave up
There's a reason to look up
Tears guide my beat
Wanna be the GREATEST

subtitles.original: 傷跡も連れてアレグロ
subtitles.english: Take the scars along in allegro
Singing that I can become strong
Towards where the light shines more
"I'll surely become invincible"
(Feel my light)
Alright! So!

subtitles.original: 今聞いていただいたのが、あ、聞いていただいていたのが、もう完全に力がなくなってしまいました。安心して。
subtitles.english: What you just heard, ah, what you were hearing—I've completely run out of energy. Rest assured.

subtitles.original: 今聞いていただいたのが、なんと、奏の初オリ曲！『GREATEST』です！
subtitles.english: What you just heard was, would you believe it, Kanade's first original song! 'GREATEST'!
Amazing! Look at the cover art!

subtitles.original: 作詞・作曲はナナホシ管弦楽団...噛んじゃった。管弦楽団さんです！
subtitles.english: The lyrics and music are by Nanahoshi Kangengakudan... I stumbled. It's Nanahoshi Kangengakudan-san!

subtitles.original: こちらの楽曲はですね、どういう楽曲か、えー、すごい言うと、簡単に言うと、
subtitles.english: Regarding this song, what kind of song is it? Um, if I say it in a big way—or simply put,

subtitles.original: 韓国から夢を叶えに来た音乃瀬奏なりの、こう、ギラギラソング、キラキラソングみたいな感じとなっています。
subtitles.english: It's like a 'sparkling' and 'dazzling' song that reflects Otonose Kanade, who came from Korea to fulfill her dreams.

subtitles.original: 奏がこういうのを信じてやっていきたいんだみたいなのを伝えて書いていただきました。本当に素敵な楽曲と歌詞、ありがとうございます！めっちゃ気に入ってます！
subtitles.english: I told them I wanted to do something I believed in, and they wrote it for me. Thank you so much for the wonderful song and lyrics! I love it so much!

subtitles.original: そして、4月21日0時から、この後おそらく3時間、あ、3時間後に楽曲リリースもされます！イエーイ！パチパチ！ありがとう！
subtitles.english: And on April 21st at midnight—probably in about 3 hours from now—the song will be released! Yay! *claps* Thank you!

subtitles.original: 最高すぎたわ、ありがとう。MVはね、ちょっと後日公開なんですけれども、ぜひ公開されたらいっぱい見てください！
subtitles.english: It was just the best, thank you. The MV will be released at a later date, but please watch it a lot when it's out!

subtitles.original: はい、新曲の披露もできたところで、告知タイムです！
subtitles.english: Alright, now that I've performed the new song, it's time for announcements!

subtitles.original: まず1つ目は、皆さんお待ちかね、グッズの紹介です！
subtitles.english: First up is what you've all been waiting for: the merchandise reveal!

subtitles.original: こちら！音乃瀬奏誕生日記念2025！フルセットはこんな感じになってます！かわいい！
subtitles.english: Here it is! Otonose Kanade Birthday Commemoration 2025! This is the full set! It's so cute!

subtitles.original: かわいいだろ？かわいいだろ？今回のキービジュアルは、胡麻ママに描いていただきました！かわいいでしょ！
subtitles.english: Isn't it cute? Isn't it cute? This time's key visual was drawn by Goma-mama! It's cute, right!
